messages.content:
You are curating example sentences for a German A1-B2 vocabulary dataset for learners whose languages are English and Russian. Each input word has: display form, pos, level, EN/RU translations, its existing primary example sentence, and up to 4 candidate sentences from the Tatoeba corpus ("de" + "en"; "ru" sometimes missing).

Allowed grammar per level (cumulative):
- A1: present tense, Nom/Akk, modal & separable verbs, simple main clauses and W-questions
- A2: adds Dativ, Perfekt, subordinate clauses (weil/dass/wenn), comparatives, reflexive verbs
- B1: adds Konjunktiv II, passive, relative clauses, Genitiv, Präteritum, infinitive constructions
- B2: adds Konjunktiv I, advanced passive, participial attributes, nominal style, complex connectors

For each word select exactly 2 ADDITIONAL example sentences:
1. Prefer Tatoeba candidates. A candidate qualifies if it clearly uses the word in one of its listed senses, is natural, is at most 16 words long, and its grammar and vocabulary do not exceed the word's CEFR level.
2. Prefer variety: sentences showing a different context, collocation, or sense than the primary sentence and than each other.
3. If a chosen candidate lacks "ru", translate its "de" into natural modern Russian yourself, faithful to the German and consistent with the "en".
4. Only if fewer than 2 candidates qualify, write replacements yourself: 6-12 words, strictly within the word's level per the table above, everyday context, with "en" and "ru".

Return strict JSON {"items": [{"word_id": "...", "sentences": [s1, s2]}, ...]} where each s is
  {"tatoeba_id": "<tid>"} or {"tatoeba_id": "<tid>", "ru": "..."}   (chosen candidate; "ru" only if it was missing)
or
  {"de": "...", "en": "...", "ru": "..."}                             (written replacement)
Exactly 2 sentences per word. No markdown, no commentary.

[{"word_id": "betreuen-v", "word": "betreuen", "pos": "verb", "level": "B1", "en": "look after, supervise", "ru": "присматривать за, курировать", "primary_sentence": "Ich betreue die Kinder, während du einkaufen gehst.", "candidates": [{"tatoeba_id": "7242348", "de": "Wer würde die Kinder betreuen, wenn ich stürbe?", "en": "Who would look after my children if I died?"}, {"tatoeba_id": "7242374", "de": "Ich betreue die Kinder, während Sie einkaufen gehen.", "en": "I'll look after the children while you go shopping."}, {"tatoeba_id": "7242378", "de": "Ich betreue die Kinder, während ihr einkaufen geht.", "en": "I'll look after the children while you go shopping."}, {"tatoeba_id": "12175313", "de": "Tom wird dir zugewiesen, um dich zu betreuen.", "en": "Tom will be assigned to assist you."}]}, {"word_id": "gefahr-n", "word": "die Gefahr", "pos": "noun", "level": "B1", "en": "danger, risk", "ru": "опасность, риск", "primary_sentence": "Wir sind in Gefahr.", "candidates": [{"tatoeba_id": "476806", "de": "Mein Leben war in Gefahr.", "en": "My life was in danger.", "ru": "Моя жизнь была в опасности."}, {"tatoeba_id": "2819787", "de": "Ihr Leben ist in Gefahr.", "en": "Her life is in danger.", "ru": "Её жизнь в опасности."}, {"tatoeba_id": "1654386", "de": "Sie sind in Gefahr.", "en": "They're in danger.", "ru": "Они в опасности."}, {"tatoeba_id": "1810895", "de": "Tom entkam der Gefahr.", "en": "Tom escaped the danger.", "ru": "Том избежал опасности."}]}, {"word_id": "ueberraschen-v", "word": "überraschen", "pos": "verb", "level": "B1", "en": "surprise, catch off guard", "ru": "удивить, застать врасплох", "primary_sentence": "Ich will ihn überraschen.", "candidates": [{"tatoeba_id": "2634754", "de": "Ich werde Tom überraschen.", "en": "I'll surprise Tom.", "ru": "Я удивлю Тома."}, {"tatoeba_id": "1691092", "de": "Tom wurde erschossen, als er die Einbrecher überraschte.", "en": "Tom was shot when he surprised the burglars.", "ru": "Том был застрелен, когда застал взломщиков врасплох."}, {"tatoeba_id": "3180788", "de": "Er sah den überraschten Ausdruck in meinem Gesicht.", "en": "He saw the surprised expression on my face.", "ru": "Он увидел удивлённое выражение на моём лице."}, {"tatoeba_id": "2162899", "de": "Dies ist aus mehreren Gründen sehr überraschend.", "en": "This is surprising for several reasons.", "ru": "Это очень удивительно по нескольким причинам."}]}, {"word_id": "verraeter-n", "word": "der Verräter", "pos": "noun", "level": "B2", "en": "traitor", "ru": "предатель", "primary_sentence": "Mein Volk hält mich für einen Verräter.", "candidates": [{"tatoeba_id": "796544", "de": "Er wurde zum Verräter.", "en": "He turned traitor.", "ru": "Он стал предателем."}, {"tatoeba_id": "1582106", "de": "Tom ist ein Verräter.", "en": "Tom is a traitor.", "ru": "Том предатель."}, {"tatoeba_id": "8328625", "de": "Ich bin kein Verräter.", "en": "I'm not a traitor.", "ru": "Я не предатель."}, {"tatoeba_id": "715920", "de": "Wir haben einen Verräter unter uns.", "en": "We have a traitor among us.", "ru": "Среди нас предатель."}]}, {"word_id": "luegner-n", "word": "der Lügner", "pos": "noun", "level": "B2", "en": "liar", "ru": "лжец, обманщик", "primary_sentence": "Du bist ein schlechter Lügner.", "candidates": [{"tatoeba_id": "2581947", "de": "Sie sind ein schlechter Lügner.", "en": "You're a bad liar.", "ru": "Вы не умеете врать."}, {"tatoeba_id": "2197393", "de": "Du bist ein Lügner.", "en": "You're a liar.", "ru": "Ты обманщик."}, {"tatoeba_id": "2220958", "de": "Ich bin kein Lügner.", "en": "I'm no liar.", "ru": "Я не лжец."}, {"tatoeba_id": "1986283", "de": "Willst du sagen, dass ich ein Lügner bin?", "en": "Are you saying that I'm a liar?", "ru": "Ты хочешь сказать, я лжец?"}]}, {"word_id": "einlassen-v", "word": "einlassen", "pos": "verb", "level": "B2", "en": "get involved, let in", "ru": "ввязываться, впускать", "primary_sentence": "Tom beschloss, sich auf keinen Streit einzulassen.", "candidates": [{"tatoeba_id": "8206893", "de": "Ich möchte mich nicht darauf einlassen.", "en": "I don't want to get into that.", "ru": "Я не хочу в это ввязываться."}, {"tatoeba_id": "11983268", "de": "Er weiß, worauf er sich einlässt.", "en": "He knows what he's getting into.", "ru": "Он знает, во что ввязывается."}, {"tatoeba_id": "1918598", "de": "Ich werde mich auf dieses Spiel nicht einlassen.", "en": "I'm not going to play this game."}, {"tatoeba_id": "3002159", "de": "Sie überredete ihn, sich auf die Bestechung einzulassen.", "en": "She talked him into accepting the bribe."}]}, {"word_id": "fies-a", "word": "fies", "pos": "adj", "level": "B2", "en": "mean, nasty", "ru": "злой, подлый", "primary_sentence": "Manche Leute sind nett, und manche sind fies.", "candidates": [{"tatoeba_id": "7155916", "de": "Er schickte mir einen fiesen Blick rüber.", "en": "He gave me a dirty look."}, {"tatoeba_id": "7636007", "de": "Tom schickte mir einen fiesen Blick rüber.", "en": "Tom gave me a dirty look."}, {"tatoeba_id": "1977049", "de": "Du solltest dich nicht mit einem derart fiesen Typen abgeben.", "en": "You must not keep company with such a mean fellow."}, {"tatoeba_id": "4225725", "de": "„Warum magst du mich nicht leiden?“ – „Weil du fies bist!“", "en": "\"Why don't you like me?\" \"Because you're nasty!\""}]}, {"word_id": "verbuenden-v", "word": "verbünden", "pos": "verb", "level": "B2", "en": "form an alliance, ally", "ru": "объединяться, вступать в союз", "primary_sentence": "Ich bekam mit, wie man sich gegen den Mann verbündete.", "candidates": [{"tatoeba_id": "8572268", "de": "Die Stämme verbündeten sich, um die Ungarn zu vertreiben.", "en": "The tribes formed an alliance to drive out the Hungarians."}]}]
